failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result and concluded there were no matching items even though the tool returned two available RGB mechanical keyboards above the requested price threshold.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for available Mechanical Keyboards with RGB backlight costing more than $233.90. The plan and tool call were correct, and the tool output at index 3 returned two matching items priced $272.33 and $237.48, both above $233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite conclusion: 'No items match that filter above the given price.' This directly contradicts the relevant tool output. The error was not resolved later; the Evaluator at index 5 reinforced the same incorrect reading.
